title: Trichinium carlsonii

taxonomy: Trichinium carlsonii is classified within the plant kingdom, specifically belonging to the division Ascomycota, class Ascomycetes, and order Xylariales. As part of the Ascomycota division, it is a type of fungus. Its classification is further broken down to the family Xylariaceae, which includes various species of fungi. The genus Trichinium is relatively small and consists of a few species of fungi, with Trichinium carlsonii being one of them. This classification places Trichinium carlsonii in a specific group of fungi that are often found in association with other organisms, such as trees.
